example_message: Define a constant instead of duplicating this literal "latest-44-nixos-25.11" 3 times.
Refactor this function to reduce its Cognitive Complexity from 26 to the 15 allowed.
Remove this "timeout" parameter and use a timeout context manager instead.
Use "min()" instead of sorting to find this value.
Do not use Array index in keys
`String.raw` should be used to avoid escaping `\`.
